hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "Repo: $(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || echo N/A)"; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo N/A)"; echo "Uncommitted: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ") files"; echo "Last commit: $(git log -1 --format="%h %s" 2>/dev/null || echo none)"'

compact_instructions: Preserve: active repo name and relative path, current branch, list of modified files, current test status, open 508 findings, uncommitted changes. After compaction, re-state which repo is being worked on.
